name: git-helper
description: Common git operations (status, log, diff, show, add-commit, stash, branch, checkout, checkout-file, log-diff, config, root) in one step, with optional directory for add-commit; show action supports --grep, -A/-B/-C context, --head/--tail to filter output in one step, replacing git show + grep pipe pattern, with --cd to change directory before running.

parameters.name: --cd=DIR, -C DIR
parameters.description: Change to directory before running git command (replaces cd + git pattern)

parameters.name: args
parameters.description: Additional arguments: file path for diff/show/checkout-file, commit message for add-commit, N for log/log-diff, key+value for config, directory for add-commit, starting directory for root; for show action: --grep=PATTERN, -A=N, -B=N, -C=N, --head=N, --tail=N

examples.expected: Lines matching 'func doSource' with 40 lines of after-context

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses git branch/status/log/diff/add-commit/checkout-file/root calls that would otherwise be separate steps; show --grep replaces git show + grep + head/tail pipe chain, saving 2+ steps per use and reducing observation size; --cd replaces cd + git two-step pattern.
